comments:
Static HTML string renderer for Halogen в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ HALOGEN COMPATIBILITY LAYER в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ This module renders Halogen's `HH.HTML w i` to HTML strings. **WHY unsafeCoerce EXISTS HERE:** Halogen's VDom passes props as an opaque polymorphic `a` type, but the actual runtime value is always `Array (Prop i)`. We coerce to extract attribute data for static rendering. This is safe because: 1. VDom guarantees the structure is `Array (Prop i)` 2. We only read Attribute/Property string data 3. Handler and Ref constructors are ignored (return Nothing) **PURE ALTERNATIVE:** If you want zero unsafeCoerce, use `Hydrogen.Target.Static` which renders Hydrogen's pure `Element msg` type. That path has no escape hatches. в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ Renders `HH.HTML w i` to a plain HTML string, suitable for: - Server-side rendering (SSR) - Static site generation (SSG) - SEO-friendly pre-rendering Usage: ```purescript import Hydrogen.HTML.Renderer as Renderer html :: HH.HTML Void Void html = HH.div [ HP.class_ (ClassName "foo") ] [ HH.text "Hello" ] rendered :: String rendered = Renderer.render html -- => "
Hello
" ```

declarations.comments:
Render Halogen HTML to a string with default options.
Widgets are rendered as empty strings (they represent component slots).
declarations.title: render

declarations.comments: Render Halogen HTML to a string with custom options.
declarations.title: renderWith

name: Hydrogen.HTML.Renderer
